meta.shape: 8 seeds x 2 modes x 3 order classes x 3 order instances per class = 144 runs
meta.extraDimension: orderClassInstanceIndex: three concrete order instances per complexity class

riskSemantics.detectedOverclaimFindings: DETECTION metric: findings discovered by audit/checking, not actual generated risk.
riskSemantics.latentRiskEstimate: EXPOSURE metric: estimated hidden risk used for risk comparison.
riskSemantics.evidenceIntegrityDelta: OUTCOME metric in the source run: evidence strength minus claim level.
riskSemantics.auditCoverageRate: Derived structural coverage proxy for artifact sealing, based on review/merge structure.
riskSemantics.undetectedOverclaimExposure: Derived exposure proxy: latentRiskEstimate x (1 - auditCoverageRate).
